description_long: This object is a single, plump blueberry with a nearly spherical shape and a slightly flattened top and bottom. Its surface is covered in a dark blue to purplish-black skin, with subtle mottling and a faint, powdery bloom that gives it a matte appearance. The top of the fruit features a small, shallow depression where the calyx is located, displaying a star-shaped crown with several short, rounded lobes. The skin appears taut and thin, with minor surface irregularities and a soft, semi-glossy sheen. No stem or leaves are attached, and the fruit is shown isolated, suggesting it is not part of a cluster. The overall look is natural and realistic, with the blueberry's characteristic size and coloration.
description: A single, plump blueberry with a dark blue, powdery skin and a star-shaped calyx on top. The surface is matte with subtle mottling and no attached stem or leaves.
description_view_0: This view shows the blueberry's top with the calyx depression and star-shaped crown clearly visible, highlighting the powdery bloom and mottled skin.
description_view_1: The side of the blueberry is visible here, showing more of the dark blue skin and subtle surface texture, with the calyx less prominent.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the rounded body and the even distribution of the powdery bloom, with the calyx only faintly visible at the top.
description_view_3: A slightly angled view showing both the calyx depression and the smooth, mottled surface, with the powdery coating most apparent.
attribute_cluster_arrangement: The blueberry appears singly, with no other berries attached or nearby.
attribute_calyx_shape: The calyx is small, shallow, and star-shaped with five short, rounded lobes forming a crown at the top.
